metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins for autonomous workflows, development process, and session monitoring.

plugins.name: claude-hud
plugins.description: Real-time statusline HUD for Claude Code — context health, tool activity, agent tracking, and todo progress.

plugins.name: motif
plugins.description: Personal development workflow plugin. Encodes a 4-stage process (Research, Plan, Build, Validate) for any codebase.

plugins.name: helm
plugins.description: Orchestrates fully autonomous agent sessions that take a task from discovery through to a merged PR without human interaction.
